storyEvents	CREATE TABLE `storyEvents` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `storyId` int NOT NULL,
  `establishmentId` int NOT NULL,
  `eventType` enum('click','add_to_cart','order_completed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `productId` int DEFAULT NULL,

  `orderValue` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `sessionId` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
